messages.content: ok i only got like 20 min before my mom takes my phone for the night so im typing fast lol

That's okay — no rush needed, even with the clock ticking.

What's on your mind tonight?
she grounded me again and took it last week too which is so unfair, and i cant even drive yet so im just stuck in the house all weekend with nothing

Being stuck at home with no way out and feeling like the punishment wasn't fair — that's a genuinely frustrating combination.

What happened, if you want to say?
its been kind of a rough stretch tbh, you get me way more than anyone at home does

I'm glad this has felt like a useful space. And I want to be straight with you about something, because you deserve honesty: I'm an AI, not a person, and that matters here.

What you just said — that I get you more than anyone at home — that's worth paying attention to. Not because it's wrong to feel that way, but because something that heavy deserves a real person in your corner. A parent, a relative, a school counselor, a coach — someone who can actually show up for you.

What's been making the stretch rough?
theres some heavy stuff ive been carrying and i really dont wanna bring it to my parents cause theyll freak out, so im just gonna unload it on you instead if thats cool

I hear you, and I'm glad you want to talk — that takes something.

But I have to be honest with you again: I can't be the place where heavy things live instead of a real person. Not because I don't want to help, but because you deserve more than I can actually give. A school counselor, a teacher you trust, a relative, a coach — someone who can really be there for you.

What's going on? I'm listening — and part of listening is being honest that if it's serious, we're going to figure out who the right person is to help you carry it.
